I'm thinking maybe after you stay idle for a bit while diving - Frog

description: A beanie with a flower-shaped pompom. It's popular with fledgling trainers in Alola.

author: .payapon
name: Alolan Sunhat
description: A sun hat adorned with flowes. It's popular with fledgling trainers in Alola.

author: .payapon
name: Red Hat w/ Glasses
description: A fashionable hat topped with sunglasses. It's popular with fledgling trainers in Kalos.

author: aplastic
name: Propeller Hat
description: A silly-looking multi-colored hat with a propeller on top.

author: .payapon
name: Silph Scope
description: A scope that makes unseeable Pokémon visible. It is made by Silph Co.

author: .payapon
name: Headband
description: A simple headband that keeps your hair out of your face.

author: .payapon
name: Pink Beanie
description: A warm, pink beanie that is often by skiers.

author: ohok3441
name: Skitty TV
description: A wearable TV themed like a Skitty. Use it to watch your battle replays!

author: worm9766
name: Mareep Sleep Mask
description: An eyemask resembling a Mareep's face.

author: quarases
name: Slowking Shell
description: A Shellder that has latched onto your head, forcing you to evolve into a king.

author: the.red.letter
name: Pile of Sludge
description: A thick sludge that, astonishingly, sits perfectly atop your head!
notes: obtained by having the player investigate a sewer pipe or a similar grimy place and pop back out with sludge atop their head!

author: ohok3441
name: Slurpuff Cake
description: Wearing this tasty cake on top of your head makes it so that you never have to stop eating it!

author: .realthree
name: Small Barrette
description: It's a cute barrette. It's commonly used as an accessory in Pokémon Contests.

author: .realthree
name: Smiley-Face Mask
description: It's a quirky mask. It's commonly used as an accessory in Pokémon Contests.

author: ohok3441
name: Sharp Feather
description: A feather worn on the head that ressembles the ear of a Sneasel.

author: sakebishi
name: Snorlax Hat
description: A hat designed to look like Snorlax’s face, featuring its signature sleepy expression.

author: kiwikelly
name: Snorunt Hat
description: A warm winter hat that is made to ressemble a Snorunt.

author: .realthree
name: Snow Crystal
description: It's an elegant clip. It's commonly used as an accessory in Pokémon Contests.

author: duskrd
name: Solosis Bubble
description: Have you ever wondered what it's like to be a Solosis? Now you can find out!

name: Head Spheal
description: A spheal has taken up residence on your head.

author: .rayzard
name: Spheal Toque
description: A warm winter cap that looks like a spheal is taking a big bite out of your head.

author: ohok3441
name: Fusion Beret
description: A beret made to ressemble DNA Splicers.

author: gummy.frog
name: Mysterious Sprout
description: Somehow, a little leaf has managed to sprout from your head.

author: .realthree
name: Square Glasses
description: It's an elegant pair of glasses. It's commonly used as an accessory in Pokémon Contests.

author: knilk
name: Squad Shades
description: Cool shades worn by the leader of the Squirtle Squad!

author: ohok3441
name: Starmie Hair Clip
description: A fashionable hair clip ressembling a Starmie with seaweed and corals.

author: .realthree
name: Striped Tie
description: It's an elegant tie. It's commonly used as an accessory in Pokémon Contests.

author: ohok3441
name: Sudowoodo Horn
description: A branching horn made out of rock that appears to have fallen off a Sudowoodo.

author: .payapon
name: Shock Shades
description: Shockingly cool sunglasses.

author: volvonovic
name: Head Swablu
description: A cozy Swablu who decided to perch atop a trainer's head.
notes: stay idle on mt. moon summit

author: gummy,frog
name: Sylveon Hair Bow
description: A cute, pink hair bow that ressembles a Sylveon's.

author: .payapon
name: Head Tentacruel
description: A tiny Tentacruel that picked your head as a resting spot. Watch out for those tentacles!

author: .realthree
name: Tiara
description: It's an elegant tiara. It's commonly used in Pokémon Contests.

author: .realthree
name: Tie
description: It's an elegant tie. It's commonly used as an accessory in Pokémon Contests.

author: matpal6
name: Red Top Hat
description: A dapper top hat with a red band.

author: bucklin
name: White Top Hat
description: A dapper top hat with a white band.

author: ohok3441
name: Forest King Crown
description: A crown that makes anyone who wears it feel like they are the king of the forest.

author: dabouiw
name: Triangle Shades
description: Cool sunglasses shaped like triangles.

author: .payapon
name: Trumpet
description: Wear Hoenn's national instrument with pride! You can almost hear the faint sound of trumpets surrounding you.

author: ohok3441
name: TV Head
description: A TV worn as a helmet that could probably be used to watch replays of your battles... If only it worked!

author: chromaerym
name: Tyrunt Mask
description: A big Tyrunt shaped mask that gives you an urge to bite.

author: jarvisreley
name: Black Flat Cap
description: A black flat cap, often worn by Veteran trainers.

author: .payapon
name: Gray Knitted Hat
description: A gray knitted beanie. It's popular with fledgling trainers in Galar.

author: ohok3441
name: Pokéball Barrette
description: A stylish barette featuring a Pokéball design.

author: ohok3441
name: Waterfall Scarf
description: A silky see through scarf based around Wallace's outfit. It shimmers like a waterfall under sunlight.

author: ohok3441
name: Straw Hat
description: A simple hat made out of straw that is typically worn by Bug Catchers.

author: malxire
name: Safari Hat
description: A hat worn by safari zone groundskeepers.

author: chromaerym
name: Whiscash bowl hat
description: An elegant hat that looks just like a Whishcash.

author: .realthree
name: White Domino Mask
description: It's a cool mask. It's commonly used as an accessory in Pokémon Contests.

author: .realthree
name: White Hand
description: This ghostly white hand doesn't seem to be visible to other people...

author: .realthree
name: Windup Key
description: It's a quirky costume piece. It's commonly used in Pokémon Contests.

author: malxire
name: Feathered Cap
description: A cap just like the one Winona of Fortree Gym wears.

author: .realthree
name: Witchy Hat
description: It's a quirky hat. It's commonly used in Pokémon Contests.

author: gummy.frog
name: Wooper Hair Clips
description: Hair clips that resemble the purple gills of a Wooper.

author: coridiant
name: Straw Sun Hat
description: A wide-brimmed straw hat. It's popular with fledgling trainers in Kanto.

author: blackbosom
name: Youngster Cap
description: A cool cap worn by the younger generation. Must be worn backwards to be hip.

author: Busilisk
name: Head Zigzagoon
description: A Zigzagoon that has taken a liking to perching atop a trainer's head.

notes: Found in the cafe after dark. Would also be funny to have it under cold-weather gear since its a hot drink
